name: netdust-wp
description: Netdust WordPress plugin — WP discipline (security, database, bedrock-composer), WP planning (plan-requirements injects WP-security four-pillar + ntdst-core pattern requirements + the matching golden-path slice into the plan at harnessed-development Stage 1), WP reference (frontend, testing, infra), ntdst-core framework (architecture, data, patterns + four golden-path feature exemplars mined from real Stride/Rossi, yootheme), and WP commands (/wp-new-project, /scaffold-plugin, /sync-db, /setup-tests). Layers on top of netdust-core for memory, hooks, dev-stack, server management, code review, cross-domain skills, and /deploy.
